sections.paragraph: m. fish, so called from being so wonderfully prolific (see the root דָּגָה ), Jon 2:1, 11 Jon 2:11Plur. דָּגִים constr. דְּגֵי, Gen 9:2 Num 11:22 1Ki 5:13. Hence is derived the denominative verb דּוּג to fish. See the form דָּאג above. (In the cognate languages fish is called נוּן, ذون; a trace of this Hebrew word is found in the Gr. ἰχθύς.)
